COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-09-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-08-13 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Dept. 206 for settlement on the record
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288
Pius Josepy, Esq. for the Plaintiff: Jerry Canilao.
Robert Ford, Esq. and Beau Richard Burbidge, Esq. for the Defendant Koh Samui and The Monkey.
George Fogy, Esq. for Intervener Endurance Reinsurance Corp.

Case settled for $235,000.00, terms stated on the record.
Parties agreed to terms, matter is deemed settled and placed on the CRC Dismissal calendar for 01-08-13 @ 10 a.m. in Dept. 610.
